name: Safale US-05
notes: Clean American ale yeast, versatile, neutral. The workhorse.

name: Safale S-04
notes: English ale yeast, fruity esters, flocculates well. Great for stouts and English ales.

name: Nottingham Ale
notes: Very clean, high attenuation, fast fermenter. Neutral profile.

name: Windsor Ale
notes: English-style, low attenuation, fruity, full-bodied beers.

name: WLP001 California Ale
notes: Classic American ale. Clean, versatile. Same strain as US-05.

name: WLP002 English Ale
notes: Malty, fruity, full-bodied. Classic English character. Very flocculant.

name: WLP013 London Ale
notes: Dry, malty, clean, slightly fruity. Great for porters and stouts.

name: Wyeast 1056 American Ale
notes: Clean, crisp, well-balanced. Same strain as US-05/WLP001.

name: Wyeast 1968 London ESB
notes: Bold, malty, rich. Highly flocculant. Great for English bitters and stouts.

name: Safale K-97
notes: German ale yeast, produces subtle fruity esters, good for wheat beers and Kolsch.

name: Lallemand Philly Sour
notes: Single-pitch souring yeast (Lachancea). Produces lactic acid + alcohol in one fermentation — no kettle sour step needed. Stone fruit esters. Perfect for fruited sours.
